title: SWXMLHash  is low version that can't build new Xcode Server
author: PeiCinh
body:
When build on Xcode server will error.
the messgae is 
Error: SWIFT_VERSION '3.0' is unsupported, supported versions are: 4.0, 4.2, 5.0. (in target 'SWXMLHash')

title: Support iOS 9.3 (by changing 1 line of code)
author: mccallus
body:
All that is needed to support iOS 9.3, and by extension a whole lot of older devices such as iPad2, is to change one line of code in Shine.swift:

```
-		UIApplication.shared.open(downloadTriggerURL, options: [:], completionHandler: nil)
```
to 
```
+		UIApplication.shared.openURL(downloadTriggerURL)
```

Given that nothing else in this project requires iOS 10+ I consider it an issue that support is not granted to earlier iOS version and devices. Hopefully you agree and can update the project to support older versions as opposed to making people fork the repo. 

Please and thank you.

title: Date parsing bug
author: jonasbeckers
body:
The parsing of a date from the xml file fails when your locale is not some variant of english. 
For example Tue, 10 April 2018 10:01:11 -0600 does not parse if your region is Belgium.
It might be better to choose an other dateformat that is not dependent on localization.
